---
title: "The machines are fine. I'm worried about us."
author: "Minas Karamanis"
date: "2026-03-30"
date-added: "2026-04-11"
categories: [AI, science, pedagogy, research]
status: to-read
url: "https://ergosphere.blog/posts/the-machines-are-fine/"
---

On AI agents, grunt work, and the part of science that isn't replaceable. Argues that outsourcing scientific 'grunt work' to LLMs carries deep pedagogical risks.

[Read the full article →](https://ergosphere.blog/posts/the-machines-are-fine/)
